summary: David Silver is reportedly raising $1 billion for a new startup, Ineffable Intelligence. The venture focuses on reinforcement learning and experience-led learning, moving away from training models on human-generated internet text toward agents that learn through interaction and environment-driven feedback.

principles.statement: The next major leap forward in AI will come from systems learning predominantly from experience rather than human-generated data.
principles.rationale: Training systems through interaction and environment-driven feedback allows agents to refine themselves and complete complex tasks, moving beyond the limitations of scraped internet text.

mental_models.name: Experience-led learning
mental_models.description: A paradigm where AI systems are trained through interaction, action, and environment-driven feedback, rather than relying on static, human-generated datasets like internet text.
mental_models.example: Agents that independently complete complex tasks from simple human instructions by refining themselves through action and feedback.

anti_patterns.description: Relying primarily on vast troves of human-generated internet text to train AI models.
anti_patterns.why_it_fails: It only offers incremental upgrades to today's large language models, whereas the next major leap requires systems that learn dynamically from experience and interaction.
